description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job using the rust image that runs `cargo build --release --all` and publishes the target/release directory as an artifact. In the test stage add three cargo jobs: beta:cargo (image registry.gitlab.com/iron-oxide/docker/rust-codecov:beta, allow_failure true) runs `cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --all`; nightly:cargo (image registry.gitlab.com/iron-oxide/docker/rust-codecov:nightly, allow_failure true) runs the same test command; stable:cargo (image registry.gitlab.com/iron-oxide/docker/rust-codecov:stable, allow_failure true) runs the same test command and after_script executes `for file in target/debug/cogwheel-*[^\.d]; do mkdir -p "target/cov/$(basename $file)"; kcov --exclude-pattern=/.cargo,/usr/lib --verify "target/cov/$(basename $file)" "$file"; done && bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t $CODECOV_TOKEN && echo "Uploaded code coverage"`. In the deploy stage add a pages job using the rust image that runs `cargo doc --all --no-deps`, `rm -rf public`, `mkdir public`, `cp -R target/doc/* public`, and publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, but only on the master branch.
